chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1432 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on CMA No.10685/2025 2.For hearing of main case. 27.05.2025 Mr.Manzoor Hussain Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Ali Haider Saleem, Addl. P.G. 1. Urgency granted. Under instructions learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and states that he will seek remedy before the forum of competent jurisdiction. In view hereof, the petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge nasir
